message:
fix(blob-leases): remove unnecessary borrow and Ok wrapper per clippy

- Remove unnecessary `&` in `.tempfile_in(&self.root.path())` ->
  `.tempfile_in(self.root.path())`
- Simplify `Ok(std::fs::read(&path).map_err(...)?)` ->
  `std::fs::read(&path).map_err(...)` removing redundant Ok wrapper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
